name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: What a Week for President Trump!
body:
It started on Super Bowl Sunday when the Trump-Pence team aired a tremendous commercial that highlights the administration’s commitment to... |
---
| |
---
| Hoosier Republican,

What a week for President Trump! And it’s only Wednesday.

It started on Super Bowl Sunday when the Trump-Pence team aired [a tremendous commercial](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=39abe00700&e=1acd9bb3d6) that highlights the administration’s commitment to criminal justice reform. President Trump keeps his promises and thousands of families are being reunited thanks to his leadership on criminal justice reform. His Super Bowl commercial features Alice Marie Johnson, a woman who was imprisoned for over two decades for a non-violent offense. The commercial, [which you can watch by clicking here,](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4d6afd6c6f&e=1acd9bb3d6) was widely praised for its message and emotional impact.

On Monday, we saw a total breakdown of the Democrat Caucus in Iowa.

Four years in the making, and the Democrats—who want to control your healthcare—couldn’t do something as simple as count votes. Compare that to the Republican Caucus where enthusiasm for President Trump broke records. Never in the history of that event have more people turned out to support an incumbent president. Iowa Democrats were forced to choose between competing shades of socialism, and the night ended as a complete failure and debacle for them. It’s a real metaphor for what happens when Democrats are asked to run things.

Last night, President Trump delivered an optimistic and forward-looking State of the Union.

He talked about a booming economy, record low unemployment for women, African Americans and Hispanics. He talked about our energy independence, 187 new, conservative federals judges and two new Supreme Court Justices. He talked about a rebuilt military and our successes abroad in eliminating high-value terrorists. Opportunity Zones, school choice, cutting taxes, lowering prescription prices, strengthening our border – it was a unifying message of the American Comeback and perhaps the best speech President Trump has ever delivered.

Nancy Pelosi’s reaction? She threw a temper-tantrum and ripped up her copy of the speech immediately after President Trump concluded. She ripped up a service member being reunited with his family, and a Tuskegee Airman and his great-grandson celebrating a past and future of service to our country. “America is a land of heroes,” the president reminded us. “The home of Thomas Edison and Teddy Roosevelt... Washington, Pershing, Patton and MacArthur. The home of Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Amelia Earhart, Harriet Tubman, the Wright Brothers, Neil Armstrong, and so many more.” Pelosi tore all that up, too.

Here’s hoping next year, when the president delivers the first State of the Union of his second term, there’s a new, Republican Speaker of the House sitting behind him.

This morning, our own Karen Pence was back home again in Indiana to officially file for President Trump and Vice President Pence to be on Indiana’s ballot for reelection. I was honored to join Gov. Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch, Secretary of State Lawson and national committee members Anne Hathaway and John Hammond, as well as over 60 enthusiastic Trump-Pence supporters as Mrs. Pence filed. We’re organized, motivated and energized and will make sure Indiana is once again first on the board for the Trump-Pence ticket on Election Night.

And today, the Senate finally ended the sham impeachment by rightfully acquitting the President.

After a five-month abuse of power, House Democrats did everything they could to divide our country by pushing debunked conspiracy theories. The impeachment hoax was a waste of time, money, and an embarrassment of Congress. Thankfully, it is finally over.

When you add the Iowa debacle, the president’s masterful State of the Union, Pelosi’s tantrum and impeachment acquittal to the President’s rising poll numbers, the Blue Collar Boom and the continued upward mobility of the American people, it’s easy to say this was quite a successful week for President Trump. And it’s only Wednesday!

Thanks,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---

name: Wendy Davis
subject: The conclusion of impeachment:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
We need to speak truth to power...
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk71-su-nd")
---
Friend,

We've reached the end of one of the most consequential moments in our country's history - a moment that America's founders anticipated and provided a framework for, yet which has occurred only two other times in nearly 244 years.
The sheer magnitude makes me wonder what our founders would think of the Senate voting to acquit Donald Trump of any wrongdoing. Would their faith in our democratic institutions remain strong? Or would they be shocked, even saddened, by politics triumphing over the rule of law?
Personally, I'm worried about the implications for our country's future, and how my grandbabies will react to what they read about in the history books in a decade's time: The obstruction of key witnesses, withholding crucial evidence from the public, disregarding the 75% of Americans who wanted a fair trial with witnesses.
That's not the kind of country I want for my family - where a president can say and do anything for his personal benefit. But our republic was founded on a great ideal: The freedom to speak truth to power. Raising our voices is one of the most substantial ways to shape our nation - and in times like these, we need to stand up for what's right. Not just on one day in November, but every day.
**Before midnight, will you join me in speaking truth to power? I'm counting on 3,000 supporters to speak out, so please make your voice heard:**
| | **Did the Senate conduct a fair impeachment trial for the American people?**
---
| | | [YES](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk71-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk71-su-nd")
---
Thank you for stepping forward during this critical moment for our country.

Wendy
| If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can **[click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a31/704929dc/162198f5/3993ba4a/1138157838/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter")**. subject: If you believe Super PACs and anonymous wealthy donors have no place in our primary, chip in to fund our 100% grassroots-funded campaign for big, structural change now. Thank you in advance.

body:
We're going to let you in on a little secret: Pete Buttigieg's campaign, and a few other campaigns in this race, are being boosted by the support of Super PACs and the bigwig donors who can donate... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ac44/45c30650/1fbe5597b/66e255cb/912977720/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're going to let you in on a little secret:

Pete Buttigieg's campaign, and a few other campaigns in this race, are being boosted by the support of Super PACs and the bigwig donors who can donate millions to them.

Here are a few of the ad buys these groups have placed in the early states:

* An outside group has already spent more than **$1,000,000** on TV ads backing Pete in New Hampshire
* "Unite the Country," a Super PAC supporting Joe Biden, dumped nearly **$5,000,000** into last-minute ads for him in Iowa, and just announced another **$900,000** ad buy in New Hampshire

This type of behavior is exactly what's broken in our politics, and we won't let it go unnoticed.

On the day Elizabeth announced she was running for president, she denounced the role of Super PACs and shady outside spending in the Democratic primary.

**[If you believe Super PACs and anonymous wealthy donors have no place in our primary, chip in to fund our 100% grassroots-funded campaign for big, structural change now.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ac44/45c30650/1fbe5597b/66e255ca/912977720/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8zMkZfUkVTX05GRl9RXzIwMjAwMjA1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO32F_RES_NFF_Q_20200205_V1S3_P")**

---
>
Here's what makes these new ads even more troubling: It's illegal for candidates and Super PACs to coordinate strategy with one another.

But we just saw this tweet from one of our opponents' senior strategists, and we wanted to make sure you saw it, because it's a prime example of just how easy it is for campaigns to exploit our broken campaign finance laws:
[](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ac44/45c30650/1fbe5597b/66e255cc/912977720/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8zMkZfUkVTX05GRl9RXzIwMjAwMjA1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO32F_RES_NFF_Q_20200205_V1S3_P")
That message will be picked up by outside groups working on Pete's behalf.

As you can see, there's a pretty easy way to skirt those rules about sharing notes between Super PACs and campaigns: by doing it all in public.

Elizabeth is running a campaign that's 100% grassroots funded. She doesn't accept help from Super PACs -- or PACs of any kind -- and she doesn't accept donations from executives of giant agribusinesses, the fossil fuel industry, big tech companies, or hedge funds. She doesn't host private closed-door fundraisers where billionaires can beg for more tax breaks or lax regulations on polluting our environment, either.

**That's because Elizabeth is in this fight to create a government that works for us, not the wealthy and well-connected. That means preventing wealthy donors from buying this election.**

Instead, Elizabeth relies on this grassroots movement, made up of more than one million people, who contribute their own money to fund this campaign.

And with millions of dollars now being spent by outside groups in this primary, she needs your help more than ever. The New Hampshire primary is less than a week away, and we doubt this is the last we'll see of outside groups trying to tip the scales.

**[If you believe that our elected officials should be accountable to the people, and not secretive donors with their own set of priorities, chip in to fund our campaign for big, structural change.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ac44/45c30650/1fbe5597b/66e255ca/912977720/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8zMkZfUkVTX05GRl9RXzIwMjAwMjA1X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO32F_RES_NFF_Q_20200205_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren

clean_body: We're going to let you in on a little secret: Pete Buttigieg's campaign, and a few other campaigns in this race, are being boosted by the support of Super PACs and the bigwig donors who can donate... | | | "" We're going to let you in on a little secret: Pete Buttigieg's campaign, and a few other campaigns in this race, are being boosted by the support of Super PACs and the bigwig donors who can donate millions to them. Here are a few of the ad buys these groups have placed in the early states: An outside group has already spent more than $1,000,000 on TV ads backing Pete in New Hampshire "Unite the Country," a Super PAC supporting Joe Biden, dumped nearly $5,000,000 into last-minute ads for him in Iowa, and just announced another $900,000 ad buy in New Hampshire This type of behavior is exactly what's broken in our politics, and we won't let it go unnoticed. On the day Elizabeth announced she was running for president, she denounced the role of Super PACs and shady outside spending in the Democratic primary. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Here's what makes these new ads even more troubling: It's illegal for candidates and Super PACs to coordinate strategy with one another. But we just saw this tweet from one of our opponents' senior strategists, and we wanted to make sure you saw it, because it's a prime example of just how easy it is for campaigns to exploit our broken campaign finance laws: "" That message will be picked up by outside groups working on Pete's behalf. As you can see, there's a pretty easy way to skirt those rules about sharing notes between Super PACs and campaigns: by doing it all in public. Elizabeth is running a campaign that's 100% grassroots funded. She doesn't accept help from Super PACs -- or PACs of any kind -- and she doesn't accept donations from executives of giant agribusinesses, the fossil fuel industry, big tech companies, or hedge funds. She doesn't host private closed-door fundraisers where billionaires can beg for more tax breaks or lax regulations on polluting our environment, either. That's because Elizabeth is in this fight to create a government that works for us, not the wealthy and well-connected. That means preventing wealthy donors from buying this election. Instead, Elizabeth relies on this grassroots movement, made up of more than one million people, who contribute their own money to fund this campaign. And with millions of dollars now being spent by outside groups in this primary, she needs your help more than ever. The New Hampshire primary is less than a week away, and we doubt this is the last we'll see of outside groups trying to tip the scales. "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: BREAKING: Senate acquits President Trump!
body:
Today, House Democrats’ sham impeachment ended with the full vindication and exoneration of President Trump by the Senate. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5782a56be3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 5, 2020
---
| | |
# **BREAKING: Senate acquits President Trump!**

**Today, House Democrats’** sham impeachment ended with the full vindication and exoneration of President Trump by the Senate.

**Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham** issued the following statement in part:
| | _The Senate voted to reject the baseless articles of impeachment, and only the President’s political opponents—all Democrats, and one failed Republican presidential candidate—voted for the manufactured impeachment articles.

In what has now become a consistent tradition for Democrats, this was yet another witch-hunt that deprived the President of his due process rights and was based on a series of lies . . . Throughout this wholly corrupt process, President Trump successfully advanced the interests of the United States and remained focused on the issues that matter to Americans. He spent his time achieving real victories for the people of this country, and the Democrats—once again—have nothing to show for their fraudulent schemes. _ |
---|---|---

**President Trump’s State of the Union** address made his priorities clear: It’s time to put the partisanship in Congress behind us. One of the most important lines from his speech last night reminds our leaders who they’re here to serve. It’s not their donors, it’s not each other, and it’s not the sensationalist corporate media.

**“Members of Congress** : We must never forget that the only victories that matter in Washington are victories that deliver for the American people.”

[_Read Press Secretary Grisham’s full statement._](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6ee506fc92&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH** : [The moment the Senate acquitted President Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=480b583c95&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## **WATCH: ‘The best is yet to come’**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96eadec1e3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Last night’s State of the Union** address was unforgettable, as President Trump told the Great American Comeback Story that’s unfolding across our country.

**“Jobs are booming** , incomes are soaring, poverty is plummeting, crime is falling, confidence is surging, and our country is thriving and highly respected again,” the President said. “America’s enemies are on the run, America’s fortunes are on the rise, and America’s future is blazing bright.”

**On the issues that matter** most to working families, from fixing our broken trade deals to rebuilding our great military, President Trump has kept his promises.

**Some of the best examples** of those results came from the special guests who joined the President and First Lady last night. Here are just a few of their stories:

* **Charles McGee,** 100 years old and [one of the last surviving Tuskegee Airmen](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=540e7dd214&e=3ee4985eea), served our country in three wars: World War II, the Korean War, and the Vietnam War. “General McGee, our Nation salutes you,” the President said.

* **Amy Williams** is a military mother who works full-time while raising two young children. She still finds time to devote countless hours to helping other military families. Last night, President Trump had a surprise: “I am thrilled to inform you that your husband is back from deployment. He is here with us tonight.”

* **Tony Rankins** is an Army veteran—and a prime example of how the President’s economic policies have life-changing results. Take Opportunity Zones, part of the 2017 tax cuts law: [Tony climbed back from homelessness](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b237ff794e&e=3ee4985eea) and found a job with a construction company that invests in these distressed communities. “He is now a top tradesman, drug-free, reunited with his family,” President Trump said.

* **Carl and Marsha Mueller.** Last year, U.S. Special Forces took out the world’s top terrorist, ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi. The Muellers tragically lost their daughter Kayla at the hands of this vicious killer. In her honor, the U.S. mission was named Task Force 8-14, a reference to Kayla’s August 14th birthday. In the President’s words: “America’s warriors never forgot Kayla—and neither will we.”

[See the rest of these incredible stories.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da5596e02b&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH:** [What our flag means to everyday Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=581c3268bb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Donald J. Trump delivers his State of the Union address** | February 4, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4b437357f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e47f5c52b1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=bb599b1217)
---

subject: FWD: We need to raise $100,000 before Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hey, Team,

Did you get a chance to read this note from our finance director? It's critical, so we're bumping it to the top of your inbox.

[The next 6 days will have more of an impact in the New Hampshire primary than the last 6 months.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf3/134673f2/37c4e705/699726a8/4268652603/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

We need to raise $100,000 before Tuesday to drive our final outreach efforts before voting begins - otherwise we'll simply be outspent by other campaigns.

With so many voters still undecided, every day and every dollar counts.

[So give Jess's note a read, and if you're able, chip in whatever you can. This is truly now or never >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf3/134673f2/37c4e705/699726a8/4268652603/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Michael is uniquely situated to succeed in New Hampshire.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf3/134673f2/37c4e705/699726a8/4268652603/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") Like Colorado, it's split evenly between Republicans, Democrats, and Independents, and recent polls show that up to half of voters there are still undecided.

[When those undecided voters make up their minds on election day, he'll be there.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaf3/134673f2/37c4e705/699726a8/4268652603/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020520_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Susan Collins
subject: My vote to acquit President Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Moments ago, I voted to acquit President Trump. The criticism from my political opponents has been swift and harsh. Part of that might just be that they are mad that I refused to give into their attempts to pressure me. I also believe that the partisan origins of this proceeding -- impeachment passed the House without a single Republican vote -- was an indication of some of the weaknesses of their case.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE3MTQ5ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ2NDkwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDE3MTQ5ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ2NDkwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
Moments ago, I voted to acquit President Trump.
The criticism from my political opponents has been swift and harsh. Part of that might just be that they are mad that I refused to give into their attempts to pressure me. I also believe that the partisan origins of this proceeding -- impeachment passed the House without a single Republican vote -- was an indication of some of the weaknesses of their case.
My opponents also don't seem to share my faith in the voters when it comes to deciding who our elected officials should be. It was important for me to take my oath to do impartial justice seriously. I listened closely, I took extensive notes, and I asked questions of both sides. Ultimately, I concluded that the House Managers failed to prove their case. Here is a brief excerpt from the conclusion of my speech:
_It has been 230 years since George Washington first took the oath of office, and there are good reasons why during that entire time the Senate has never removed a President. Such a move would not only affect the sitting President but could have unpredictable and potentially adverse consequences for public confidence in our electoral process._
_It is my view that, except when extraordinary circumstances require a different result, we should entrust to the people the most fundamental decision of a democracy, namely, who should lead their country._
Peter, I am so grateful to have your support and friendship during this difficult process. **Now that this is over, it is time for the Congress to get back to work on the problems that are facing our great country.**
Thank you for letting me share my views.
Sincerely,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE3MTQ5ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMDQ2NDkwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Senator Susan Collins

name: Cory Booker
subject: Today, I voted to convict Donald Trump and remove him from office.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | This is a sad moment in our nation's history. I never imagined a day would come in which I would vote to remove a sitting President of the United States from office. But that's what I did today -- and it was clearly the right decision. **It brings me no joy to say this, but the President 's actions warrant his removal. He should no longer serve as our commander-in-chief.** **[It's a vote I didn't take lightly, but I was guided by my conscience and a deeply held belief that no president is above the law. If you agree with my decision today, add your name here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/impeach-donald-trump?source=em_pet_20200205_CB_20200205-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The way these proceedings were conducted will forever be a stain on the United States Senate, which abdicated its responsibility to hold the President accountable. We didn't hear from any witnesses, particularly John Bolton, or see relevant documents that would have provided more clarity about the President's misdeeds. **This was not a trial -- it was a coverup.** **[President Trump needs to be held accountable for his attempts to conspire with a foreign government to investigate a political rival. Sign your name here if you believe that he should be removed from office.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/impeach-donald-trump?source=em_pet_20200205_CB_20200205-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Today's outcome has set a very dangerous precedent for what an American president can get away with. I know this is a very demoralizing day for many of us. But let's not forget about this November. Now we must move forward and recommit ourselves to doing everything we can to defeat Donald Trump in this next election. In a moment like this one, it's up to us to keep speaking truth to power and never let up. The future of our democracy depends on it. Sincerely,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/impeach-donald-trump?source=em_pet_20200205_CB_20200205-pet-CB-EM1-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbc/5fca0d19/7ae82217/291d30f1/238877070/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbc/5fca0d19/7ae82217/291d30f0/238877070/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbc/5fca0d19/7ae82217/291d30ff/238877070/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fbc/5fca0d19/7ae82217/291d30fe/238877070/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Four Days in February
body:
4 pivotal days No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Four Days in February](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-j/)
Super Bowl Sunday, confusion in Iowa on Monday, State of the Union on Tuesday and today, Wednesday, President Trump will be acquitted! In this week's blog, I discuss this week's more interesting moments. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Hundreds of Thousands of Marchers - Ignored Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-d/)
Last Friday, hundreds of thousands of people of all ages gathered in Washington, D.C. for the 2020 March for Life. It was an inspiring event and in fact, one of my favorite events of the year. In this week's blog, I discuss the march and make the case for why this event should no longer be ignored by the mainstream press. Little lives do matter! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [There's More Going on Than Impeachment](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-u/)
While most of the mainstream press has obsessed the past week about impeachment, President Trump just had two great victories that will greatly impact our economy. In this week's blog I discuss these developments and provide irrefutable evidence President Trump continues to achieve monumental results for the American people. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Is California Becoming the Homeless State?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-n/)
California was the state so many Americans aspired to move to. Now, many people are fleeing California and the state is rapidly becoming the "homeless state." Sadly homelessness is a nationwide problem, including back home in Cincinnati and Hamilton County. This week I discuss this epidemic and some possible solutions. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhjrtyik-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Ben Salango
subject: West Virginia communities devastated by the opioid epidemic need action!
body:
This is an emergency.
When will enough be enough, team?
**West Virginia has the highest rate of drug overdose deaths involving opioids in the nation.** We don’t have time to waste - we need action now.
I am calling for the people of West Virginia to unite behind my plan to stop this epidemic - but I need your help to spread the message. [**Add your name to show Jim Justice you support a comprehensive opioid recovery plan for West Virginia communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14699549/154414278/-2062289957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjBiNDY4Zi1lYTQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSuqNIi-q5qbmgazMZ2CXpLbvv-Eftm1cGejR_n9NIo=&emci=350b468f-ea48-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=360b468f-ea48-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=677700)
**My West Virginia Recovery First Plan includes:**
* A tax on opioid distributors to fund drug treatment.
* Building long-term drug treatment centers across the state.
* Job training and job opportunities for those in recovery
* Working with schools, law enforcement, and the courts to fix this issue.

This is only the beginning, team. The opioid epidemic can’t be solved overnight - real, long-term solutions require strength, unity, and a bold leader willing to do whatever it takes to beat it. **West Virginians don’t deserve to be held back by the addiction epidemic.**
Jim Justice has failed West Virginian families on the opioid epidemic. A no-show governor like Justice won’t get it done - [**add your name to support a comprehensive opioid recovery plan for West Virginia communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14699550/154414279/-2062289957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjBiNDY4Zi1lYTQ4LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSuqNIi-q5qbmgazMZ2CXpLbvv-Eftm1cGejR_n9NIo=&emci=350b468f-ea48-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=360b468f-ea48-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=677700)
Together, we will move West Virginia forward.
Ben Salango
Ben Salango for WV

Charleston, WV 25339

| Thank you Senator Birdsell!
---
Help Support Sen. Birdsell's Born Alive Infant Protection Act
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| This week Republican Senator Regina Birdsell introduced SB 741-FN, the Born Alive Infant Protection Act. This important piece of legislation will **guarantee medical care for a baby no matter the circumstances of their birth**. [You can read the bill here!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzQ5OTI4Njg4NzgyNjc3NjE0JmM9eTdnNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMTU3MTc3NTAmZD11OXY5dzZ0.c-nEzbOXhCzlUDMJJvOapNFCgikkuA1yzp7ktnWNQhc) Help us make sure that this important piece of legislation makes it to Governor Sununu's desk to be signed into law! [Please consider making a contribution to the NH Senate Republicans by clicking here so that we can take back a majority in State Senate!](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzQ5OTI4Njg4NzgyNjc3NjE0JmM9eTdnNiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMTU3MTc3NTImZD1oMGo0ajR6.TwPeE_OrG4AOQhTFOXt07iAbput-GlG5q-nbrZT63oE)
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
“This bill is not about abortion, but about guaranteeing medical care for a baby no matter the circumstances of their birth. This legislation creates an enforcement mechanism to ensure babies who survive abortions receive the same level of care as any other child, it would be inhumane to do otherwise. I believe a baby who takes their first breath deserves a fighting chance and that is why I brought this legislation forward.” -Sen. Regina Birdsell

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you Senator Birdsell! Help Support Sen. Birdsell's Born Alive Infant Protection Act | | | | | | This week Republican Senator Regina Birdsell introduced SB 741-FN, the Born Alive Infant Protection Act. This important piece of legislation will guarantee medical care for a baby no matter the circumstances of their birth. Help us make sure that this important piece of legislation makes it to Governor Sununu's desk to be signed into law! | | | | “This bill is not about abortion, but about guaranteeing medical care for a baby no matter the circumstances of their birth. This legislation creates an enforcement mechanism to ensure babies who survive abortions receive the same level of care as any other child, it would be inhumane to do otherwise. I believe a baby who takes their first breath deserves a fighting chance and that is why I brought this legislation forward.” -Sen. Regina Birdsell | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

name: Team Hunt
subject: Super Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We have less than one month left until the March 3rd Primary Election! We need to get every single Republican out to polls to cast their ballot for Wesley.

That's why this Saturday is our first official **Super Saturday!**

We need your help to get Wesley's message out to as many of your friends, family members and neighbors as possible. The best way to help get Wesley's message out is to drop by one of our three block-walks organized throughout the district! Wesley will be kicking off all three block-walks, so don't be late!

All you need to bring is a pair of comfortable walking shoes! We'll take it from there.

We can't wait to see you!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

PS: Don't forget to [RSVP](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=6e1161f32d534d65b307d900ff3473de&_e=Ha6oes-E291527krSxTSM0NV0FyZKa9I189rFi13Dau5Unk49ZG7HMLMWn-GJ7WJ__woAA3ige0YVZukva772XoPj-sDzfpw7XxJIa4wVYameYG1VSJ7JutyqSJxQWCM8n-GZJkNnIlLbUUn3uWzAiOKPR6Wuj2b7-5BrYAJ8C8g8CS6bogQr0PhO6L1mIMyKKi_S141iXCUe2mbcK0sMAJNtt54V7X5u_N_FYI5vOlZk9Y9kpN5zTIh-xvAgPYd3w6sBJDHz9kIywIS08TOifGkev8z3-4tO_EVyy678TA%3D) for our Meet & Greet TONIGHT at the Buffalo Grille on Bissonnet at 5:30pm

name: James Sheatsley
subject: John Hutchison cares about our youth and their future
body:
www.justicehutch.com/donate [www.justicehutch.com/donate]
www.justicehutch.com/donate [www.justicehutch.com/donate]
I have known Justice Hutchison since he began practicing law in Raleigh County in 1980, first as a practicing attorney and then as a Judge and now as Supreme Court Justice.
As circuit court judge Justice Hutchison went out of his way to initiate and actively participate in Truancy Court in Raleigh County adding a Thursday evening truancy docket to an already busy civil, criminal, abuse and neglect docket. He also, in conjunction with the Raleigh County Board of Education, was instrumental in developing a program to put in place least restrictive alternatives with regard to habitual truants which helped return students to the classrooms.
My wife is currently the Director of Elementary Education for Raleigh County Schools, and she reports that she has compiled and reviewed substantial objective data demonstrating the positive impact on attendance for elementary school children resulting from Justice Hutchson’s Truancy Court and intervention program.
Please join me in supporting Justice Hutchison’s campaign and encourage your family, friends and acquaintances to do the same. Will you make a contribution today?
Sincerely,
Jim Sheatsley Gorman, Sheatsley & Co. Beckley, WVContribute [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]

clean_body: www.justicehutch.com/donate [www.justicehutch.com/donate] www.justicehutch.com/donate [www.justicehutch.com/donate] I have known Justice Hutchison since he began practicing law in Raleigh County in 1980, first as a practicing attorney and then as a Judge and now as Supreme Court Justice. As circuit court judge Justice Hutchison went out of his way to initiate and actively participate in Truancy Court in Raleigh County adding a Thursday evening truancy docket to an already busy civil, criminal, abuse and neglect docket. He also, in conjunction with the Raleigh County Board of Education, was instrumental in developing a program to put in place least restrictive alternatives with regard to habitual truants which helped return students to the classrooms. My wife is currently the Director of Elementary Education for Raleigh County Schools, and she reports that she has compiled and reviewed substantial objective data demonstrating the positive impact on attendance for elementary school children resulting from Justice Hutchson’s Truancy Court and intervention program. Please join me in supporting Justice Hutchison’s campaign and encourage your family, friends and acquaintances to do the same. Will you make a contribution today? Sincerely, Jim Sheatsley Gorman, Sheatsley & Co. name: Jason Leviskas
subject: Oberweis for Congress: Weekend of Action Saturday & Sunday
body:
Greetings Friends and Supporters !

We hope the new year has started off well for everyone. It's that time of year to get out and hit the campaign trail, and we plan to do just that the next few weekends leading up to election day.

We have two walks planned for this weekend.

Saturday February 8th: 12:30 pm to 4pm.
We will be gathering at the St.Charles Campaign office (1700 Lincoln Hwy, Ste J St.Charles, IL) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Sunday February 9th: 1:00 pm to 4pm.
We will be gathering at the Crystal Lake Campaign office ( 6500 Northwest Highway suite 8, Crystal Lake, IL / McHenry Co GOP Office ) at 12:30pm to hit the streets and knock on doors, place yard signs, and speak to people about Oberweis for Congress.

Let us know if you can make it !

Also the latest from JIM2020.com
<https://jim2020.com/jim-oberweis-statement-on-president-trumps-acquittal/>

Vote by Mail Information
<https://jim2020.com/vote-by-mail/>

Early voting has started, get out and vote today!

We look forward to seeing everyone this weekend,

#TEAM OBERWEIS

name: Team Stephanie
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
This is the year that we will finally unseat Chris Smith and our campaign hit the ground running to launch 2020! Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we have expanded our campaign staff and are r
|
---

| | Friends - This is the year that we will finally unseat Chris Smith and our campaign hit the ground running to launch 2020! Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we have expanded our campaign staff and are reaching more people in our community. Since we kicked off this election year, Stephanie has participated in five forums and debates. Her strong performances, coupled with record-breaking fundraising, resulted in our three top primary opponents dropping out of the race. Stephanie has also secured endorsements from dozens of local Democratic leaders. Stephanie continues to meet with voters and volunteers all over our district, speaking at local democratic clubs and joining friends and neighbors in their homes. With each event, more and more people are showing up, volunteering, donating, and spreading our message. We need every member of this strong grassroots campaign we are building in order to unseat a nearly 40-year incumbent and we are so grateful for your support! Together, we can ensure that NJ-04 has strong and fresh leadership in Washington with a Congresswoman fighting for our families every day. Thank you so much for all you have done to help us get this far and all we will continue to do in 2020 to flip this seat. \- Team Stephanie

---
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Based on the information that has come out of the impeachment trial, I believe an abuse of power occured -- and I would have voted to remove President Trump.
body:
I will always be completely honest with my supporters.

[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802927/4bef7a87/6d4efb6b/287fbf69/1863401935/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDYtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200206-1-a")

Friends,
I will always be completely honest with my team:
**Based on the information that has come out of the impeachment trial, I believe an abuse of power occurred -- and I would have voted to remove President Trump.**
Like most Mainers, I believe we needed to hear from relevant witnesses and consider all the evidence as part of this process. I also believe that, if President Trump and Mitch McConnell were really convinced of his innocence, they would have allowed witnesses to testify.
This was not the process that Americans deserved -- and Senator Collins was complicit in letting it happen. She voted _twelve times_ to block witness testimony and critical evidence, and without hearing from a single witness, she still voted to acquit President Trump.
And it gets worse: Collins tried to justify her vote by saying Trump had learned a "pretty big lesson" from the impeachment trial. I don't buy it. I know you don't either. Donald Trump himself responded hours later saying he hadn't learned a thing.
Despite her attempts to find political cover and appear like she's standing up to Donald Trump, this process has been yet another example of just how much Senator Collins has changed.
When it really counts, Senator Collins will stand with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump -- not the people she represents.
Mainers and Americans deserve better. That's why I'm running against Susan Collins for U.S. Senate and why I'm asking you now:
**[Will you make a $3 contribution to support my campaign today? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't really important.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802927/4bef7a87/6d4efb6b/287fbf69/1863401935/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDYtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200206-1-a")**
Look, we're not just going up against Senator Collins in this race. We're going up against Mitch McConnell, national Republican donors, and massive special interest groups and corporate PACs who will spend whatever it takes to preserve the status quo.
It's going to take a large grassroots team to beat them. I can't do it alone. So are you with me?
All my best,
Sara Gideon
**[Make a $3 contribution now if you want to defeat Susan Collins, take back the Senate for Democrats, and kick Mitch McConnell OUT as Majority Leader.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802927/4bef7a87/6d4efb6b/287fbf69/1863401935/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDYtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200206-1-a")**
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802927/4bef7a87/6d4efb6b/287fbf69/1863401935/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDYtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200206-1-a")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802927/4bef7a87/6d4efb6b/287fbf68/1863401935/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802927/4bef7a87/6d4efb6b/287fbf6f/1863401935/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802927/4bef7a87/6d4efb6b/287fbf6e/1863401935/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

| | Hi Peter,

**Texans have very sensitive BS meters.** We know Sen. Cornyn is only looking out for his donors and special interest allies, and we've had enough of it.

It's time to give Texans a leader who represents real Texas values: strength, courage, independence, and putting our families first -- because we sure as heck don't value the weakness, partisanship, and gridlock that's representing us now. That's why MJ is in this fight. **[And with your help](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042a/7f51f7bc/4d08e131/4ef05cc6/4057084303/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.1nd__871__&amount=10&recurring=true")** , we can win it. **[If you're already with MJ, you can chip in here >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042a/7f51f7bc/4d08e131/4ef05cc6/4057084303/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.1nd__871__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

MJ has traveled tens of thousands of miles, working with Texans to build a grassroots campaign. **She's fighting for affordable health care, immediate action to address climate change, and for a government that works for everyday Texans** , not special interests and corporate PAC donors. **[Will you help MJ take on Sen. Cornyn's big money and win for the people of Texas?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489042a/7f51f7bc/4d08e131/4ef05cc6/4057084303/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.1nd__871__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

subject: fired up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Morning, Friend,

Team Bennet is fired up as we head into the final stretch until New Hampshire, [but in order to stay competitive and make our mark, we need to raise $100,000 over the next 5 days!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaef/134673f2/37c74700/69972625/2956270886/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Polls show that a majority of voters are still undecided with less than a week to go.

[The next few days will have more of an impact on the final outcome of this primary than the last few months.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaef/134673f2/37c74700/69972625/2956270886/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Despite what some pundits and talking heads might tell you, this race is far from over. [We need the resources to double our outreach efforts, or we'll be left outspent by other campaigns!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaaef/134673f2/37c74700/69972625/2956270886/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-feb?refcode=EM_FR_B1_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We've staked our flag in New Hampshire, and it's truly now or never. name: Bill Olson
subject: Pelosi ripped up America!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hblMpxDdGl6OuRU&b=0FR1qeb7qeuM0WD_YRNi3g

Hi Peter

Did you see it?

After President Trump's excellent State of the Union speech, Democrat nutjob Nancy Pelosi ripped up his speech, in a craven act of partisan extremism:

Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.) on Tuesday ripped up her copy of President Trump's prepared remarks at the conclusion of his State of the Union address.

As Trump finished speaking and most lawmakers stood to applaud, Pelosi stood, took the printed copy of Trump's speech and tore it in half. She placed the shredded copy in a stack on the dais as Trump made his way to greet members of Congress.

Asked afterward why she tore the speech up, Pelosi told reporters it was "the courteous thing to do given the alternatives."

We need to stop Nancy Pelosi and her mindless minions, like Darren Soto!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hblMpxDdGl6OuRU&b=0FR1qeb7qeuM0WD_YRNi3g
This is a person driven insane by gross partisanship, a committed leftist who has accomplished nothing but ripping the country in two.

To heck with the radical Socialists and their anti-Americanism. If you can't get behind the sentiments in the President's speech, you're not an American. End of story.

Darren Soto called the President's speech "madness". I guess he thinks loving America is crazy!

That's why 2020 is going to be an epic year for Trump and the Republicans. Can you help me win in Florida's 9th?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hblMpxDdGl6OuRU&b=0FR1qeb7qeuM0WD_YRNi3g

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hblMpxDdGl6OuRU&b=0FR1qeb7qeuM0WD_YRNi3g
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I need your help to oust these insane Dems from Congress. The numbers are there for us to win! Let's send "nutjob" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hblMpxDdGl6OuRU&b=0FR1qeb7qeuM0WD_YRNi3g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hblMpxDdGl6OuRU&b=0FR1qeb7qeuM0WD_YRNi3g

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hblMpxDdGl6OuRU&b=0FR1qeb7qeuM0WD_YRNi3g
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Join Us & The National Democratic Training Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14717804/154579385/818407780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjY1MWY5NS0yODQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dAQLTzj1NuGFm-uG9nNqbSDGRm2xhQZi7GK2A5KMDk=&emci=cf4ba6df-2649-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e2651f95-2849-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)
Fellow Democrat,
The last 48 hours have been a whirlwind. From the State of the Union address to the partisan acquittal of President Trump, Republicans have made a mockery of our nation, lied to our people, and told everyone to reject what their eyes and ears are telling them.
It’s a dangerous time in our country. Now more than ever it is important for us to prepare for the upcoming election to ensure that our candidates, staffers, and activists are equipped with the tools they need to run successful campaigns.
Please join us and the National Democratic Training Committee on Saturday, February 22nd in South Charleston for a day of training about fundraising, communications, digital, and field organization.
For registration please follow this link: [https://traindemocrats.org/event/charleston-west-virginia-2-22-2020/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14717805/154579386/818407780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjY1MWY5NS0yODQ5LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5dAQLTzj1NuGFm-uG9nNqbSDGRm2xhQZi7GK2A5KMDk=&emci=cf4ba6df-2649-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e2651f95-2849-ea11-a1cc-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)
We need you to help us take back our state and nation, and we hope to see you there.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘They Should Have Been Working for You’
body:
"Last fall, Nancy Pelosi finally lost control of the radicals in her conference and reluctantly imposed upon the American people a..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bdb8474c52&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘They Should Have Been Working for You’**
“Last fall, Nancy Pelosi finally lost control of the radicals in her conference and reluctantly imposed upon the American people a bitter impeachment process that threatened to inflict irreversible damage upon our country,” Sen. Thom Tillis (R-NC) writes in the _Charlotte Observer_. “Congressional Democrats have spent the last five months working for themselves and trying to quench their three-year thirst to reverse the results of the 2016 election, when they should have been working for you.” [Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=487d26ba92&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Our Founding Fathers feared that impeachment would be used as a partisan tool by partisan actors ... In the impeachment of President Donald Trump, their fears have been realized.” It’s time to raise “the simple majority threshold in the House of Representatives to approve impeachment articles,” Sen. Rick Scott (R-FL) writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4275c4d03&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “House Speaker Nancy Pelosi apparently made tiny tears in her copy of President Trump’s State of the Union address — so that her speech-ripping moment could go off without a hitch. As Trump introduced cancer-stricken radio host Rush Limbaugh — who received the Medal of Freedom during the speech — Pelosi could be seen grabbing the pages off the table,” Tamar Lapin reports for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bbbd244499&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The number of Americans who applied for unemployment benefits at the end of January fell close to a postrecession low, signaling the U.S. labor market is still rock solid . . . Initial jobless claims declined by 15,000 to 202,000 in the seven days ended Feb. 1,” Jeffry Bartash reports for [_MarketWatch_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=80afae2584&e=3ee4985eea). **MIDDLE-CLASS BOOM:**[“Record economic optimism under Trump, better than Reagan, Clinton, and Obama”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=957b7402b6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14ec0757ec&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f4210e623&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=b2125e42f8)
---

| | Frankly, I'm fed up. I have a proven record of getting things done -- **when things get tough, I don 't sit on my hands waiting for someone else to fix it. I step up, roll up my sleeves, and dig in.** That's why I decided to run for Congress -- I watched Donald Trump become president on his platform of hatred, bigotry and sexism, and then I watched my own representative, Steve Chabot, defend Trump at every turn -- all the way up to yesterday's shameless acquittal. **Frankly,** I'm fed up. clean_body: | "" | | Frankly, I'm fed up. I have a proven record of getting things done -- when things get tough, I don 't sit on my hands waiting for someone else to fix it. I step up, roll up my sleeves, and dig in. That's why I decided to run for Congress -- I watched Donald Trump become president on his platform of hatred, bigotry and sexism, and then I watched my own representative, Steve Chabot, defend Trump at every turn -- all the way up to yesterday's shameless acquittal. Frankly, I'm fed up. I'm tired of politicians who go about politics as usual -- who refuse to stand up to corruption because they benefit from it. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Republicans in the Senate just wrote Donald Trump a permission slip to do whatever he wants to influence the 2020 election in his favor. The fact that Republicans aren't standing up in a unified voice to reject corruption and election interference is shameful and unacceptable -- we can 't let it become the new norm. Not only has Steve Chabot allowed Donald Trump to influence our elections, he has stood up to actively defend him. We can 't let him get away with this like Donald Trump has. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Beating Chabot and his dark money machine is going to take a lot of work \-- and we're going to need all hands on deck. Can we count on you? Nikki | | If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Ohio, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. **This cowardly acquittal vote should end the political careers of all 23 Senate Republicans up for reelection in 2020.**

Democrats need to gain **4 seats to flip the Senate** and TOPPLE Mitch McConnell's reign of obstruction.

We're off to a strong start, with heroes like Mark Kelly, Amy McGrath, and Jaime Harrison running strong grassroots campaigns in Arizona, Kentucky, and South Carolina.

But while some candidates are getting a ton of money and attention, some other Democratic challengers are flying under the radar. To flip the Senate, we have to expand the map -- and run strong races EVERYWHERE.

**That 's where our Senate Battleground Fund comes in, and why we're asking you to chip in $5 or any amount to hit our 1,000 donor goal. [These funds will go directly to Democratic challengers as soon as they're nominated, so they can tell every single swing voter what Senate Republicans just did. # It's Been a Good Week
Acquittal in the Senate. Pelosi showing her true colors at the State of the Union. The mess in Iowa. Winter Kickoff in Helena.
---
| | | It's easy to feel confident following the left's tailspin over the last few days. In fact, we as Republicans should be proud of all of our hard work. Unfortunately, now is when we must work harder than ever to support Republican candidates because the Democrats are more committed than ever to winning this November.
---
| |

| | The Left is Out in Force.
Knocking on doors, making phone calls, writing letters to the editor, and donating to candidates up and down the ballot.

name: Doug Jones
subject: My vote to convict Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Senator Hassan said I could reach out because yesterday, I voted to convict Donald Trump on both charges brought against him by Congress, and we could really use your help.
I'm already in the middle of a tough re-election campaign, but that didn't cross my mind when I weighed the evidence in the trial according to my Constitutional oaths.
Just like folks in New Hampshire are counting on Senator Hassan, I know the people of Alabama are counting on me to do the right thing. My vote isn't going to make Mitch McConnell or Donald Trump happy, though. And they're already coming after me for it. One group spent a half a million dollars last week, and more is on the way.
[**I wouldn't ask if I didn't need your help to take on McConnell and fight back. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Maggie Hassan today?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4a6/2a380d31/2283ae31/f0f5b9/2471465384/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIwNl9NV0g0Sm9uZXNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20200206_MWH4Jones_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
The evidence clearly proves that Donald Trump coerced a foreign government to interfere in our election for his personal political benefit, placing his personal interest above our national interests. I also believe that the president deliberately obstructed Congress by blocking testimony from witnesses and the production of documents during the course of the investigation. This is unacceptable, but it didn't seem to bother Mitch McConnell.
The stakes are historically high, but to Mitch McConnell and his enablers in Washington, no tactics are off-limits.
That's not how I operate. I will continue working hard in the Senate for what's right -- defending our health care, civil rights, and equality -- but I can't do it alone.
[**If you care about keeping courageous voices who will fight for what's right for the country -- not what's right for Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump -- pitch in $3 to support me and Maggie Hassan today.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4a6/2a380d31/2283ae31/f0f5b9/2471465384/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIwNl9NV0g0Sm9uZXNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20200206_MWH4Jones_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you for your support.
Doug Jones
U.S. Senator, Alabama
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc4a6/2a380d31/2283ae31/f0f5b9/2471465384/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0am9uZXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIwNl9NV0g0Sm9uZXNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4jones?refcode=e20200206_MWH4Jones_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _

name: Greg Stanton
subject: We need to take action before it is too late!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**The Trump Administration 's recent decision to rescind critical environmental protections and undermine the National Environmental Policy Act is inaccurately being**** framed as a choice to cut red tape regulations. **

In reality, the Administration is just gutting environmental protections that conserve our magnificent deserts, our clean rivers, and our stunning mountain vistas to help special interest groups and polluters.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5jc82TsoQHRVHZAQNywkENtQ_fYq63ZOFLu_iygwb-Q=/mGVBgEMbmBcFXAO_vxlHt3ur9DQlQdkVasRmPMMRijM=)

If we allow this Administration to pave over our public lands and flout environmental protections, we will never be able to get back the natural paradises that are destroyed.

**We need to take action before it is too late!**

[**SIGN ON to join me in calling on Donald Trump to stop rescinding environmental protections »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5jc82TsoQHRVHZAQNywkENtQ_fYq63ZOFLu_iygwb-Q=/mGVBgEMbmBcFXAO_vxlHt3ur9DQlQdkVasRmPMMRijM=)

Thank you for taking action to conserve our environment,

\-- _ Greg_

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Trump’s erosion of the American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
I’m sad to share this news with you. Donald Trump recently banned immigrants from Nigeria, Africa’s biggest country, Myanmar, where millions are fleei | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=ecc0b66d279b48ae98cc28012ba8c5b4&_e=fG30RUELnNNqnEzl4YXi2aV44pYNIK11lEp_GIB9NOFAl99NRP8W4wzoFfHaA5kWrClBWlsxvEmZoXPdSs0UETVlR8FPkNdoMsAco1aYyXQVn5svzHRUS2kL2IQddrX7Tk1MgJe8O-jToK321glCIpeDaQxn-QVJViGCpfHf5pXxg7k90jQjgeRwdVVB5p-eHFTsyELdhZ83uNoeJRupyCnk3CKO1X7dnhlF_m8qJ_KtRgBECA5T0sy-3xwAy8NfYKxe41LNwqg2j6L8JaA9wXuJkgZFhibaoE10r_ZINYU_U53HIXq-SzgO_X918wpMqpPuuQ6_cDSUO9Bvk5iakhbQvpQeSzq3RhaPRjyKCnGIFMuMSK93PoprqTmpF91YVuOvXaFJeXuPnD5CHkFf7sp_EkKTJNm5cuP_bkzziqcGlYXfcwJZcQSYLeMv9HBqYTuf_Cf-F7sMiLnLkwX5KZuJuMw-81T0r-xgrX7aPws%3D) I’m sad to share this news with you. Donald Trump recently banned immigrants from Africa’s biggest country, Nigeria, as well as Myanmar, where millions are fleeing genocide, Eritrea, Sudan, Tanzania, and Kyrgyzstan. This is personal for me. I fled a violent civil war to come to America and Trump is trying to change the country that welcomed me with open arms and gave me the opportunity to become the man I am today. [**If you are against Trump’s discriminatory ban against immigration from countries he doesn’t like, donate $20 to my campaign today so I can fight unconstitutional bans like this one in the U.S. Senate.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=ecc0b66d279b48ae98cc28012ba8c5b4&_e=fG30RUELnNNqnEzl4YXi2aV44pYNIK11lEp_GIB9NOFAl99NRP8W4wzoFfHaA5kWrClBWlsxvEmZoXPdSs0UETVlR8FPkNdoMsAco1aYyXQVn5svzHRUS2kL2IQddrX7Tk1MgJe8O-jToK321glCIpeDaQxn-QVJViGCpfHf5pXxg7k90jQjgeRwdVVB5p-eHFTsyELdhZ83uNoeJRupyCnk3CKO1X7dnhlF_m8qJ_KtRgBECA5T0sy-3xwAy8NfiDcOLdF78EC-9yH_Vwe-kPUOGgfOEx0ddVVkKllAIciTEywlyyX63wunIhW7DwuYzMs_zx0ecn9yKS1IRcYcoEn6ne88LWa05T3KvgxMSy08oQ8YXUhHQMsddQaTiH5n-bShNma0K8tccPs6M76hsIJZrVzcQxdod27hoFdLXby7aZtWa6rjCAGn2ta8fIapUw2_JU1L0YVVDEJHdFwbaKAjaKryfyo3YpLHItHLBLSAjWNlFUsPnSaulDowZtX3) These are people who want to travel to see their family, people who are fleeing violence, people who should have the freedom and privilege to pursue the American Dream. I came to America fleeing the Liberian Civil War, a war that took many of my loved ones far too early. I was then so grateful at the opportunity this country provides that I served in the armed forces for 22 years. I feel like this administration’s choice to pose more travel bans is a direct repudiation of my service. This travel ban is saying that Trump doesn’t want people like me, a refugee, turned veteran, turned mayor, to come here. This isn’t why I served my country. These aren’t the ideals I fought to protect. [**If you agree, donate $20.20 to my campaign right now. I can think of no better response to Trump’s dismantling of the Constitution and the American Dream than by electing a refugee to oppose him in the Senate.**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=ecc0b66d279b48ae98cc28012ba8c5b4&_e=fG30RUELnNNqnEzl4YXi2aV44pYNIK11lEp_GIB9NOFAl99NRP8W4wzoFfHaA5kWrClBWlsxvEmZoXPdSs0UETVlR8FPkNdoMsAco1aYyXQVn5svzHRUS2kL2IQddrX7Tk1MgJe8O-jToK321glCIpeDaQxn-QVJViGCpfHf5pXxg7k90jQjgeRwdVVB5p-eHFTsyELdhZ83uNoeJRupyCnk3CKO1X7dnhlF_m8qJ_KtRgBECA5T0sy-3xwAy8NfiDcOLdF78EC-9yH_Vwe-kHRaOIqrO9ZFc5Zbhg_yqsOC0YTqKaEyZgcZrite0PlDYPgpNy6VSteaHtDg_HX-XnHmDMVq6nq7aqD-y8Dw2LgCnEl06bYQcsM2x1U3izY4whMq3SiJ_YC8yr-t4qe8eMubIOXQeY0eU-nbQxWqauBtr13HZ3OEqrZrieVy1xL0YbhVLQYhTF-pqhl6Vv_QLzezE_gh8eZCtVcInfzJU-Q90Qn5EqnQDvYliBDICRL1) Yours,
Wilmot Collins

Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. [CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=ecc0b66d279b48ae98cc28012ba8c5b4&_e=fG30RUELnNNqnEzl4YXi2aV44pYNIK11lEp_GIB9NOFAl99NRP8W4wzoFfHaA5kWrClBWlsxvEmZoXPdSs0UETVlR8FPkNdoMsAco1aYyXQVn5svzHRUS2kL2IQddrX7Tk1MgJe8O-jToK321glCIpeDaQxn-QVJViGCpfHf5pXxg7k90jQjgeRwdVVB5p-eHFTsyELdhZ83uNoeJRupyCnk3CKO1X7dnhlF_m8qJ_KtRgBECA5T0sy-3xwAy8NfFM8cdSRxFjD4Sxn4Vt3vdiIP0Cb-fRWic6o8Nm3gOliMnpTZ3KtlFJZatC0dRW10c1tVeEQOX-WbRgLgmNRbzG4_C5q6DwR6sqXrWvhWFZsGIn1pPfdQ6Iz7blQ_l3WBSBD2ZnxvaFnx5vzF7lNbTJZ8X6x5mlQoPzV1b7NdKr5UsFuyRPUMKw8jUKv-ypoA5na0iDvrZOTEbjbGIvKnEezNYnKLpaa6MNCePtG6TEm8eUdDJohlNPa6NJjSq6KR)

name: Mark Warner
subject: The Senate majority is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Doug Jones is already facing a tidal wave of attacks from the Trump GOP over his principled vote. And if we're going to win back the Senate, we need to hold Doug's Senate seat and also win in Virginia
|
---
| | Derek,

For me and many of my colleagues, yesterday's vote to convict the President in the impeachment trial was one of the toughest moments of our careers. But no one faced a harder vote than my friend Doug Jones of Alabama.

Voting your conscience as a Democrat from a state that Donald Trump won by 27 points takes tremendous courage, and I want to personally ask you to join me in showing Doug Jones we've got his back as he heads into a tough re-election fight this year.

**Doug Jones is already facing a tidal wave of attacks from the Trump GOP over his principled vote. And if we're going to win back the Senate, we need to hold Doug's Senate seat and also win in Virginia.[Will you make a contribution today to help Doug Jones and I win this November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d624/53d9897e/5371df93/1c89b3b7/2333871188/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/help-doug-and-mark?refcode=20200206_f_1_nd__462__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

The fact is, Derek, every Senator with a competitive 2020 race is taking flak from the President's allies for our vote to convict Donald Trump. My potential Republican opponents are raising money off it, and so are Doug's. But boy oh boy, is he facing some opponents that we can't afford to have in the Senate. Whether it's Roy Moore, who Doug beat last time around, or former Attorney General Jeff Sessions, one of the architects of the Trump family separation policy -- they're coming after Doug for this vote. That's where we come in. Doug Jones won Alabama and he can win it again, but not without our help.

**The Senate majority and so much more is on the line this election.[Please, if you care about electing Democrats who will fight for what's right _for our country_ -- not what's right for this President -- make a contribution today to help Doug and I keep up the fight in the Senate.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d624/53d9897e/5371df93/1c89b3b6/2333871188/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA name: Laura Loomer
subject: She said, "It’s a dark day for our nation"
body:
Last night, the Senate voted to acquit President Trump. It’s not a time for cheering because you and I know how this has been a hate-driven witch hunt from the start.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363310-850873-4853962-3cf7c49fdd-46ec8d0190)
Patriot,

Last night, the Senate voted to acquit President Trump.

It’s not a time for cheering because you and I know how **this has been a hate-driven witch hunt from the start**.

Between the Mueller investigation and the unrelated impeachment investigation, hearings and trial, **American taxpayers are out $35 million**.

But in business, there’s also the lost opportunity which has likely cost our economy BILLIONS of dollars as Democrats attempted to destabilize the Office of the President.

It didn’t work and now Democrats are pouting and dreaming up their next Coup attempt – **AND THEY’LL TRY IT AGAIN IN 2021!**

Here’s what my opponent, Lazy Lois Frankel had to say after the acquittal:

So let me get this right, Pelosi’s puppet, Lois Frankel believes it’s a “dark day for our nation” because entitled Democrats in Congress didn’t get their way?

**No, the acquittal of President Trump was the day we stopped the advance of liberal hate dead in its tracks, shrugging it off to focus on the prosperity of our nation.**
To keep advancing, we have to end the Democrats’ control over the House, and that starts with President Trump’s home district, Florida 21.

[**Help me win my election today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363310-850873-4853962-3cf7c49fdd-46ec8d0190)
Thanks to the success of our fundraising, we were able to run our first snap poll yesterday.

I’m still going through the reports but so far, it’s shocking and I believe it represents the tone of the nation.

I’ll share some of those results with you tomorrow, and in the meantime, [**please help me hit our February fundraising goal by donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363310-850873-4853962-3cf7c49fdd-46ec8d0190).

Thanks again for all that you do, and [**let’s make sure this never happens to President Trump again**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363310-850873-4853962-3cf7c49fdd-46ec8d0190).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. My opponent, Lois Frankel, really is the right-hand woman of Nancy Pelosi. I came across this picture taken on the night of President Trump’s State of the Union address and just before Pelosi shredded President Trump’s historic speech. It wouldn’t surprise me if Frankel came up with the idea.

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-363310-850873-4853962-3cf7c49fdd-46ec8d0190)

Now that we are just days away from the New Hampshire primary, some of our competitors will do whatever it takes to raise the money they need -- including using Super PACs to fund huge advertising efforts.

Outside groups have already spent millions of dollars in New Hampshire to promote our competitors, and with only a few days left, their spending is only going to go up.

That's why we set a goal to raise $2 million through small-dollar contributions from some of our strongest supporters. Together, we can prove to America that you don't need to do politics as usual to win elections. **But with only a few days left until the primary, we need your help now more than ever to reach our goal.**

**We're running this campaign the right way, with no Super PACs, no corporate interests, and no closed door private fundraisers -- Elizabeth doesn't want their support. But she needs yours.**

[**Chip in $2 or anything you can to help reach our goal and close the spending gap between Super PACs and our campaign.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852ad97/45c30650/1fbb77d8f/66e24c91/2665302521/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8zM0ZfRUdMX0dSTV9UXzIwMjAwMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO33F_EGL_GRM_T_20200206_V1S1_P")
