clean_body: Now that we just days away from the New Hampshire primary, some of our competitors will do whatever it takes to raise the money they need -- including using Super PACs to fund huge advertising.... | | | "" | Thanks to Super PACs supporting our opponents, we're being outspent on ads in New Hampshire. Can you chip in to help close the gap? | "" Now that we are just days away from the New Hampshire primary, some of our competitors will do whatever it takes to raise the money they need -- including using Super PACs to fund huge advertising efforts. Outside groups have already spent millions of dollars in New Hampshire to promote our competitors, and with only a few days left, their spending is only going to go up. That's why we set a goal to raise $2 million through small-dollar contributions from some of our strongest supporters. Together, we can prove to America that you don't need to do politics as usual to win elections. But with only a few days left until the primary, we need your help now more than ever to reach our goal. We're running this campaign the right way, with no Super PACs, no corporate interests, and no closed door private fundraisers -- Elizabeth doesn't want their support. But she needs yours. name: MJ Hegar
subject: The choice I made
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I want to tell you a little more about why I decided to get into this race.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e19/249697278/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I'm not what many might call an obvious choice for a Senate candidate, so I want to tell you why I decided to get into this campaign (**[If you're with me, you can make a donation here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e18/249697278/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=10&recurring=true")**).

I'm not a career politician, and I know it's going to be TOUGH for an outside candidate to beat an eighteen-year incumbent senator who has spent his time in Washington currying favor with the DC establishment as Mitch McConnell's right-hand man -- instead of serving Texans. **But I 've taken on a lot of tough fights in my life, and that's why I know I can win this one.**

I decided to step up and run against John Cornyn because I believe I have what it takes to win. **[Will you pitch in now to help us win the upcoming Texas primary and take on Sen. Cornyn from the strongest position possible?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e18/249697278/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=10&recurring=true")** **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e18/249697278/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Texas deserves better than a senator who votes to rip health care away from millions, blocked bills to lower prescription drug prices, and flat out refused to take action on gun violence.

I will fight for y'all in the Senate and be accountable to the _people_ only. As the only political outsider in the race and a working mom who has personally faced the struggles working Texans deal with every day, you can be sure of that.

**If you 're ready for a senator who will put you first, I need you to pitch in so we can take on Sen. Cornyn and his special interest allies:** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e1e/249697278/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e1c/249697278/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e12/249697278/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e10/249697278/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e16/249697278/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__")**
Thanks for all that you do,

MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890434/7f51f7bc/4d0acb96/4ef05e18/249697278/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200206.2nd__878__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Cruel and outrageous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
They should be ashamed.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8410?t=3&akid=8031%2E868730%2E2stlGi) Friend, "Give me your tired, your poor, your huddled masses yearning to breathe free." Last week's ruling by the Supreme Court in favor of President Trump's "public charge" rule is antithetical to those words, emblazoned at the feet of the State of Liberty -- the beacon of freedom and welcome for our country. This "public charge" rule makes it more difficult for immigrants who use public benefits like Medicaid and food stamps to become permanent residents. When it was first proposed in 2018, I spoke out immediately and staunchly against it -- and I speak out again today because it's cruel. And the cruelty is the point. **[This ruling is outrageous, and our friends and family need to know it: Share the news about the new "public charge" rule today.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8410?t=4&akid=8031%2E868730%2E2stlGi)** Fourteen percent of our total population is immigrants, with 25 percent of Washingtonians living in a household with at least one immigrant. So for us, this is personal. And because of this rule, more than 140,000 people in Washington could lose their health insurance -- forcing folks into emergency rooms for routine medical care, while women could lose routine reproductive services and expectant parents could lose prenatal care. But again: It's purposely cruel. No one, immigrant or otherwise, should be penalized for needing help to get on their feet. We've seen it time and time again from this administration, and this proves there's no end in sight. But no matter the battle, I will keep fighting for better. **[The "public charge" rule is dangerous, and our friends and family need to know it: Share the news on Facebook right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8410?t=5&akid=8031%2E868730%2E2stlGi)** Very truly yours, Jay | [SHARE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8410?t=6&akid=8031%2E868730%2E2stlGi)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=8031%2E868730%2E2stlGi). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2020 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

name: =?utf-8?Q?=F0=9F=9A=A8Team_Collins_ALERT_=F0=9F=9A=A8?=
subject: Susan's under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Cory Gardner didn't do the right thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, Yesterday, Republicans like my opponent, Cory Gardner, voted to acquit the president and showed the American people that they would rather protect Donald Trump than get the truth. Before I go any further, I want you to know: **I would have voted for evidence. I would have voted for witnesses. I would have voted to convict.** My friend, Alabama Senator Doug Jones, also shares those convictions. You see, Doug represents an extremely competitive state that, more often than not, votes for Republicans. He knew his vote would open him up to massive attacks from the GOP (and it did!), but he did the right thing anyway. **It 's clear we need fewer people like my opponent and more people like Doug Jones in the U.S. Senate. That's why I'm asking if you'll split a donation between our campaigns so we can keep Doug's seat and get our government working again.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200206-jones?refcode=em-200206-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Peter, did you hear the news?

Congresswoman Elise Stefanik's E-PAC has endorsed OUR race for Congress.

_Elise has been the leading voice in working to get more Republican women elected to Congress. Her support means a lot._

You might remember, conservatives suffered huge losses with women voters in 2020, and E-PAC is dedicated to making sure that DOESN'T HAPPEN AGAIN. They've spent countless hours getting to know women voters, supporting women candidates, and they're doing everything to get women to the polls this November.

**Their work will make a major difference in 2020 and I'm honored to join the list of terrific conservative women supported by E-PAC.**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=df6459d477834fe7b918a4dc5c67257c&_e=atM2YvYBiFzkkdpetyjdskVnlLc2SCXfvnieQIC0MlpB1bNMQzlHm9Ffylelh3R9NsEHkvIvMF2rXgnw4gUB7NeWKHSxfMrn9TshiJmhR9e56dVf2qTFvLlgDI5cutCGXfMhsVq_5YR1JOAbULa3ovGjBZS5RCZbE2wMu-cr5lUW0t8VA7YMSgPJvVyq1wEZV3WQm9kqA5lo4S72AgLlPuGCPP0GhNV-9XPU0PnVkSfC4DCVugJ0UOttEMV_xxC9w8Bh-Qa0ZlXtHcRKLY2zPQ3Yt6fTPr2-vFmHHYUnaTRgkVRfxieduWceC07Fawj7vQ9t6RAvVTk6nOGAjW6bicqe1fbEVc3yenhJ2Vp9irdMRmaiCeYWBDzsgPNVOvF4FVeSNrjIibvSolzADi8VWPwJPPbodelHYqXy-ttqvfpf-fPeELuN4ziyevIXMv-Z)
“I am excited to endorse Claudia Tenney for Congress this cycle... Upstate New York needs someone who will go to Washington and deliver real results for NY-22, someone who will work to further President Trump’s agenda, not obstruct it. I know Claudia will be that person and look forward to having her in Congress once again.”
[ **JOIN ELISE: Chip in now >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=df6459d477834fe7b918a4dc5c67257c&_e=atM2YvYBiFzkkdpetyjdskVnlLc2SCXfvnieQIC0MlpB1bNMQzlHm9Ffylelh3R9NsEHkvIvMF2rXgnw4gUB7NeWKHSxfMrn9TshiJmhR9e56dVf2qTFvLlgDI5cutCGXfMhsVq_5YR1JOAbULa3ovGjBZS5RCZbE2wMu-cr5lUW0t8VA7YMSgPJvVyq1wEZV3WQm9kqA5lo4S72AgLlPuGCPP0GhNV-9XPU0PnVkSefEqaaNGx1BAEjxL76UOTYHNA7E2bXDs2jhTVnAYTo1NjqSxMEluDMlv2ecgF2IznBibFNSolW8jBaNeVJfktdEEuKgULJHpum6sLuU6-AKSmvBbjNyTcDsT679gSAASYy8pG0AuUFulX5xW6G65S4OZoELwbbUgxqgjL3AWw7gNYfQo5nYanF9aQqyNkMxYRywv_akfscMjXdV_e60q1s)
Peter, when I was in Congress, I worked closely with President Trump and conservative superstars like Elise to deliver real results for the people of Upstate New York.

Together, we dramatically reduced burdensome and unnecessary regulations, provided increased funding to Upstate New York’s military assets, and so much more. And I know we are not finished yet!

We just have to work together now to make sure I can get to Washington to continue our hard work. With the support of amazing groups like E-PAC, I know we’re one step closer to getting there already.

I hope you'll join Elise today and chip in now to support my campaign.
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[ **ONE CLICK DONATE: $20 >>** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=df6459d477834fe7b918a4dc5c67257c&_e=atM2YvYBiFzkkdpetyjdskVnlLc2SCXfvnieQIC0MlpB1bNMQzlHm9Ffylelh3R9NsEHkvIvMF2rXgnw4gUB7EEDai8E8JrJ3hdAG9RsJkuFZfmPuYOuqJisMXsV4o5yNfU8uN6U0THm2i34yZxMV_OI_oSaJuTuhns1PKE8FfrU6-eJcSdFufM2C1oJAkvNtZLG0yApUG05TZxGhsX6uIRtcXyp4Z8fUdqFv9bl2Gms8at96ZlWzQmrs5zZJMnXCU1r-lKavDQzGK-oaj2kbD9HaSeyOknwSyljlVth-4GGLuLshaqHUZRxBcwxzvtz4JEGpF6y2lFuU3m0J9HkDCl9U4zLaiBJowoZee_CuWmlNo3ctCz3-IN_JoA9WU5Qf-h17vDWRYyMEQD2_7INeBgAcOmeKI_178W7upluM931K_3xTQCKVC7vmTLsvAvkvBuT2FjFpF-v0Pk2WItQDkMb0m77sxOC9RrlXqBn2NLL6bbbzbF2SakpSD2ic2Fk)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I want you to know why I voted to remove the President of the United States from office.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200206-remove?refcode=em200206-remove&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend,

Yesterday, I voted to remove the President of the United States from office. And I want you to know why.

While I disagree with the President on a lot of issues, I believe impeachment should be the last resort. But when I read the whistleblower report alleging nothing less than the President's corrupt abuse of power, we had no choice but to begin an impeachment inquiry. And when the House sent two articles of impeachment to the Senate, I took an oath to "do impartial justice according to the Constitution and the law."

This trial was not just about what President Trump did for personal political gain. It was about whether we, as your elected leaders, had the courage to stand up for what's right and hold the President of the United States accountable.

But a trial without witnesses and evidence is not a real trial. And an acquittal in such a trial is not a real acquittal either.

Some have said we should let the people decide in the next election. But when the President solicits foreign nations to influence our elections with disinformation and prevents the public from hearing a full and fair account of that effort, we cannot sit on our hands and do nothing. Our duty is to support and defend the Constitution, and this moment called on us to take immediate action.

There is nothing inevitable about democracy, it is something we have to fight for. And now, the fight for democracy and our Constitution has chosen us.

We have a lot of work to do between now and November. Democracy is hard work. But I know folks like you are up to the task. That's why I'm turning to you now.

**Please, consider adding a contribution of any amount you can afford to help us bring accountability back to our government and elect leaders who will uphold the rule of law. Donate today.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200206-remove?refcode=em200206-remove&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200206-remove?refcode=em200206-remove&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")

| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200206-remove?refcode=em200206-remove&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
This November, we can put our values -- and our anger about this vote -- on the record. Together, if enough of us take this sadness and frustration, and channel it into action, we can show that every Republican who voted to protect President Trump will be held accountable.

This process let me down. I'm sure it let you down, too. But we must continue to fight for our values and hold our elected leaders accountable.

Thank you,

Tina

clean_body: I want you to know why I voted to remove the President of the United States from office. | "" Friend, Yesterday, I voted to remove the President of the United States from office. And I want you to know why. While I disagree with the President on a lot of issues, I believe impeachment should be the last resort. But when I read the whistleblower report alleging nothing less than the President's corrupt abuse of power, we had no choice but to begin an impeachment inquiry. And when the House sent two articles of impeachment to the Senate, I took an oath to "do impartial justice according to the Constitution and the law." This trial was not just about what President Trump did for personal political gain. It was about whether we, as your elected leaders, had the courage to stand up for what's right and hold the President of the United States accountable. But a trial without witnesses and evidence is not a real trial. And an acquittal in such a trial is not a real acquittal either. Some have said we should let the people decide in the next election. But when the President solicits foreign nations to influence our elections with disinformation and prevents the public from hearing a full and fair account of that effort, we cannot sit on our hands and do nothing. Our duty is to support and defend the Constitution, and this moment called on us to take immediate action. There is nothing inevitable about democracy, it is something we have to fight for. And now, the fight for democracy and our Constitution has chosen us. We have a lot of work to do between now and November. Democracy is hard work. But I know folks like you are up to the task. That's why I'm turning to you now. Please, consider adding a contribution of any amount you can afford to help us bring accountability back to our government and elect leaders who will uphold the rule of law. Donate today. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" This November, we can put our values -- and our anger about this vote -- on the record. Together, if enough of us take this sadness and frustration, and channel it into action, we can show that every Republican who voted to protect President Trump will be held accountable. This process let me down. I'm sure it let you down, too. But we must continue to fight for our values and hold our elected leaders accountable. Thank you, Tina

# This is ridiculous...
We Must Take Back the House!

It has been a fantastic week for President Trump. He delivered an incredible State of the Union address and the next day he was acquitted by the Senate, finally bringing an end to the impeachment circus.

We couldn't be more proud of our Commander in Chief and his accomplishments during his first term in office. Thanks to President Trump our economy is humming, unemployment is at record lows, and most Americans are seeing higher take-home pay. _**President Trump is delivering on his promises.**_

Do you know who isn't delivering for the American people? Spiteful Nancy Pelosi...

[Will you chip in to help us take back the House from Nancy Pelosi? Anything helps... $50, $25, or even $5.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=098c06adaf&e=1050d051da)

| Following President Trump's incredible State of the Union speech Tuesday night, Nancy Pelosi decided to make a public display of her distaste for the President and all he represents by tearing up the President's speech. This level of disrespect and resentment does not belong in the leadership of the U.S. House of Representatives.** Enough is enough.**

[It is time for Republicans to take back the majority in the House and show Nancy the door.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2872937598&e=1050d051da)

We'd love to have you join our campaign to send Jake LaTurner to Congress as a true conservative who has the backbone to fight for your Kansas values.

President Trump needs an army of allies in the House and the Senate to help him keep the momentum he has started and continue to add more jobs, improve trade, secure our borders, and keep America great!

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

Hey friend, are you planning on watching the next presidential debate this Friday, February 7? You know we are. It’s all going down at 8:00 p.m. Eastern/5:00 p.m. Pacific Time in Manchester, New Hampshire, but TeamTom is going to be gathered around TVs across the country to watch Tom shine! **In case you need a reminder for the big day, text the word DEBATE to the phone number 468-66 right now and we’ll send you a quick heads-up before it starts.**

(If you’re worried about suddenly getting a bunch of phone spam, don’t worry — we’re not like that. We’ll only send you a debate reminder and the occasional critical update, but you can always change your messaging preferences directly via text, or reach out to us by replying here to [info@tomsteyer.com](mailto:info@tomsteyer.com).) Excited for Friday,
Tom 2020

name: Sara 2020
subject: Senator Collins went on Fox News to defend her vote to acquit President Trump.
body:
That was a fast turnaround!

Friends,
Senator Collins voted to acquit President Trump yesterday and then ran straight to Fox News for support.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580292b/4bef7a87/6d4211a2/287fbf1b/1227885221/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDYtMi12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200206-2-v2-a")
Just like she did in 2018 after confirming Brett Kavanaugh, Senator Collins is turning to Fox News for political cover after voting with Mitch McConnell and Trump. **And just like back then, all she 's concerned about is trying to find political cover!**
Susan Collins is never going to stand up to Mitch McConnell or Donald Trump -- so it's time to elect a Senator who will.
**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Susan Collins. Together, we will take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580292b/4bef7a87/6d4211a2/287fbf1b/1227885221/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDYtMi12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200206-2-v2-a")**
We know we can win this race. Collins' net approval ratings have dropped **51 points since 2017** -- she's more vulnerable than ever.
Let's keep pushing,
Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580292b/4bef7a87/6d4211a2/287fbf1b/1227885221/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMDYtMi12Mi1hIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200206-2-v2-a")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Warren 2020
subject: This is a critical moment for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
This is a close race and right now, all eyes are on the New Hampshire primary coming up in just 5 days -- and it's going to take a lot of work and a lot of resources to win. This is a critical... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852adac/45c30650/1fb9ab87d/66e2732a/3299133334/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In a moment, we're going to ask if you can make a contribution to help reach our goal of raising $2 million by the time polls close in New Hampshire. But first, we'd like to explain why your gift today is so important.

This is a close race and right now, all eyes are on the New Hampshire primary coming up in just 5 days -- and it's going to take a lot of work and a lot of resources to win.

This is a critical moment for our campaign, and $2 million is what we need to support our extensive organizing and advertising programs throughout the state. And unlike some of our opponents in the race, we don't allow outside Super PACs to boost our efforts. **Elizabeth Warren relies on supporters like you.

Everything this campaign does is only possible because of grassroots donations, and right now we're asking you to chip in for the first time to help reach the goal of $2 million by the time polls close in New Hampshire on Tuesday.**

**[Click here to chip in $2, or whatever you can, right now. Every single contribution gets our campaign one step closer to the $2 million goal _and_ helps get our message of big, structural change out at this critical time -- and getting Elizabeth's message out is how we'll win.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852adac/45c30650/1fb9ab87d/66e2732d/3299133334/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItbWFyY2gzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU8yNUZfRUdMX0dSTV9XXzIwMjAwMjA2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-march3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO25F_EGL_GRM_W_20200206_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

But first, we'd like to explain why your gift today is so important. This is a close race and right now, all eyes are on the New Hampshire primary coming up in just 5 days -- and it's going to take a lot of work and a lot of resources to win. This is a critical moment for our campaign, and $2 million is what we need to support our extensive organizing and advertising programs throughout the state. And unlike some of our opponents in the race, we don't allow outside Super PACs to boost our efforts. Elizabeth Warren relies on supporters like you. Everything this campaign does is only possible because of grassroots donations, and right now we're asking you to chip in for the first time to help reach the goal of $2 million by the time polls close in New Hampshire on Tuesday. | | We're angry about yesterday's vote. As we're sure you are too. In a rigged Senate trial, Donald Trump was acquitted. This should motivate us - more than ever - to mark our calendars for November 3rd and vote in numbers we've never seen before. **But we need to ensure our voices count. That's why we're calling to _Abolish the Electoral College_. Are you with us? [Sign your name now - demand that we abolish the Electoral College:](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390366/55b66746/222139d1/80fee12/3047198300/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-electoral-college/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-end-electoral-college-email-smd")** [Abolish the Electoral College](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390366/55b66746/222139d1/80fee12/3047198300/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/end-electoral-college/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-end-electoral-college-email-smd") One person. name: Tom Steyer
subject: Everyone has a right to a quality public education
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
I'm not sure if you've heard me talk about my mother Marnie before, so I'll take a second to introduce her now. She taught for 15 years in the New York public school system and worked long hours teaching remedial reading to prisoners at the Brooklyn House of Detention. Marnie was someone who believed that you had to give back as much as you got -- that being a part of this country meant serving it in any way you could. With her in my mind, I sat with policy experts to come up with this plan that would not only best honor her legacy, but would give back what I could. [_**I hope you 'll read my plan to provide a world-class education for every child -- for your kids, for the teachers in your life like Marnie Steyer, and for your own future.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P2y9A21Hvj7Qn5Knmp6N2cLiGRSP1Qv-2Boe-2FhtQHqyuzlaw0Y1bHc0-2F46PHph-2BzifHAQdU9gRWX78MxRrQWb1NQDYpqsCi1rWtqdBRzDcXpOTUoemTyi1nlPx8ARYxN-2Bvbv5mR2z8eAMUZF0l84tLDFZDfaKVk1EjZnbaPH81ybC9A-3D-3D_FAX_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YfmChiafu1ldNhZsW1kq2mZ3mXTc-2Fso8K5aRPj6ggFLSYR-2Fq-2FW2-2BswGUdxHPrh2GxH-2Ba41veIg01UJ1exBxSRaNSLkmCEnqluXfWavSWelj5GTFwwVDH39usiSOseRFz1egX9SDTFSICOm4cYI8Nz7igy2yLy67XUHN5osyyxQZH3ZSVC7vquSrWVY7TfPXs26vnXYHcVtV1aGkmAAOTZ-2Fk8OxYL-2BKQuYeTRSrIhe9VfA9ncwfrrf92FFIjSeIjtlTpbJvib8Jl-2FXeNF3npdXxQNQmD8BHvINrVZXFrjy-2BQ5AfCrw5mN-2FPJ3aZlvMaylMnOxFdIQ0aXcyRwLMf-2B-2BNP-2BcExByTCxYKTGbeN7otaQWQ-3D-3D) I think about my mom often, miss her keenly, and carry the values she instilled in me wherever I go. But she wasn't just an inspiration to our family -- she touched the lives of so many of her students, too. Every day, teachers go above and beyond to prepare Americans for the challenges they'll face tomorrow. They deserve to be protected by a society that respects their work. But today, teachers and students are struggling to build a future in an education system that's been deprioritized, underfunded, and inadequately resourced for too long. As president, I will double federal investment in pre-K and K-12 education while working to equalize educational resources and learning opportunities, ensure every student is mentally and emotionally supported, and reinvigorate civic engagement in our society. **Investing in the future of America means investing in our students and our teachers. Education is a right, for all.[_Join me and add your name to support our schools_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P2y9A21Hvj7Qn5Knmp6N2cLiGRSP1Qv-2Boe-2FhtQHqyuzlaw0Y1bHc0-2F46PHph-2BzifHAQdU9gRWX78MxRrQWb1NQDYpqsCi1rWtqdBRzDcXpOTUoemTyi1nlPx8ARYxN-2Bvbv5mR2z8eAMUZF0l84tLDFZDfaKVk1EjZnbaPH81ybC9A-3D-3DfGmo_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YfmChiafu1ldNhZsW1kq2mZ3mXTc-2Fso8K5aRPj6ggFLSYR-2Fq-2FW2-2BswGUdxHPrh2GxH-2Ba41veIg01UJ1exBxSRaNSLkmCEnqluXfWavSWelj5GTFwwVDH39usiSOseRFz1dOG8mpCekeTRaj4V9o-2Fp4Jf-2Fgad8B9-2BEfLunaWtjlJFGEz1dRqnQ51di4fXeb0ltPVTSPEyYNvlWL4D0ILiwlVBBD-2FuTzf2jcr4yelkVQZg3PEPQhNlzR7aUkVjXeQIpmX3VsCrZwLSNI3JzuN3iKUrYK4I4WygpxYXqXVKNfvgxTafFnSXsFBjVqOLaU69ZyKhGWF05NsbmDd3r3XVCDSonA2sQemKR5tSPRUW3V7Xw-3D-3D)**[ _._](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P2y9A21Hvj7Qn5Knmp6N2cLiGRSP1Qv-2Boe-2FhtQHqyuzlaw0Y1bHc0-2F46PHph-2BzifHAQdU9gRWX78MxRrQWb1NQDYpqsCi1rWtqdBRzDcXpOTUoemTyi1nlPx8ARYxN-2Bvbso2xUTKsi1B1u1wK5SzqUnjWbJs1BwGcrFEqfu-2BUO40w-3D-3Drq64_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YfmChiafu1ldNhZsW1kq2mZ3mXTc-2Fso8K5aRPj6ggFLSYR-2Fq-2FW2-2BswGUdxHPrh2GxH-2Ba41veIg01UJ1exBxSRaNSLkmCEnqluXfWavSWelj5GTFwwVDH39usiSOseRFz1ft7D9EzYfCd5jlwI24ZDbq95YStOAPkV5oFQOUUDX1jb5PBBKWpN5kP-2FRlPqCWzU4ld8qaWn0XbU0DSfkQZklOA6pE0pnM7TRAmm-2F8IMv5nV7bjiDAcSBumeaLthhCbIq49IxJPk9LwJa4bDGD6Nj8gNUn3z9AuuE5Uhb8DOJzjxj1Vz90tHubT7krAHTx8fiREIIXXGa-2BZ4E6H5-2BTdGleIY-2FupYrEemRQzMWZPLdybQ-3D-3D) In memory of Marnie,
Tom

clean_body: | | | | I'm not sure if you've heard me talk about my mother Marnie before, so I'll take a second to introduce her now. She taught for 15 years in the New York public school system and worked long hours teaching remedial reading to prisoners at the Brooklyn House of Detention. Marnie was someone who believed that you had to give back as much as you got -- that being a part of this country meant serving it in any way you could. With her in my mind, I sat with policy experts to come up with this plan that would not only best honor her legacy, but would give back what I could. I think about my mom often, miss her keenly, and carry the values she instilled in me wherever I go. But she wasn't just an inspiration to our family -- she touched the lives of so many of her students, too. Every day, teachers go above and beyond to prepare Americans for the challenges they'll face tomorrow. They deserve to be protected by a society that respects their work. But today, teachers and students are struggling to build a future in an education system that's been deprioritized, underfunded, and inadequately resourced for too long. As president, I will double federal investment in pre-K and K-12 education while working to equalize educational resources and learning opportunities, ensure every student is mentally and emotionally supported, and reinvigorate civic engagement in our society. Investing in the future of America means investing in our students and our teachers. Education is a right, for all. In memory of Marnie, Tom Thanks for reading our emails, friend. Tom is fired up and ready to defeat Donald Trump this November and put his progressive plans in place, but he needs you to have his back. Our campaign is asking supporters to commit to vote for Tom right now. When you commit, we’ll make sure you have all the information you need to show up strong for Tom. subject: My friend Doug Jones

| He needs our help. Team, Yesterday, Senator Doug Jones made the courageous decision to vote to remove Donald Trump from office for his abuse of power. Doug holds a very competitive Senate seat in Alabama, one of the reddest states in the country. He is Alabama's first Democratic senator in nearly two decades and he's up for re-election this fall. It would've been politically expedient for him to vote against convicting the President, who is very popular in Alabama. But Doug did the right thing despite what it might mean for his re-election chances. **Now it 's on us to help Doug defend his Senate seat against Jeff Sessions and Roy Moore, both of whom are running against him. I've seen firsthand through our work together in the Senate that Doug is a dedicated public servant who represents his state honorably. I actually had the privilege of campaigning with him in Alabama back in 2017 when he ran for his seat and saw for myself how dedicated he is to his constituents.
In these uncertain times, Doug upheld his oath to protect and defend the Constitution -- showing us what true leadership really looks like.
Unfortunately, that isn't going to stop Jeff Sessions, Roy Moore, and the other Republicans currently in this race. They're already attacking Doug for his gutsy vote yesterday. **This will be a very difficult election -- and Doug needs our help.**
**[There's no doubt that Donald Trump and his allies are going to do everything they can to try and win back this Senate seat. Chip in now to help Doug have the resources to fight back.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-dougjones-split?refcode=em_fr_20200206_CB_20200206-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I hope to have the honor of serving with Doug in the Senate for another term.
Cory

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The real story they won’t tell you
body:
“Our country has never done better than it is doing right now,” President Trump said this morning. He’s right—and the numbers prove it. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8fee78422&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 6, 2020
---
| | |
# **The real story they won’t tell you**

**“Our country** has never done better than it is doing right now,” President Trump said this morning. He’s right—and the numbers prove it.

**While one party** mourns the death of its political stunt, here is the news from the rest of America:
* [Americans’ economic optimism](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a35d095b56&e=3ee4985eea) just hit a record 44-year high—better than under Presidents Reagan, Clinton, or Obama. That confidence is buoyed by an unemployment rate near 50-year lows, a record stock market, and plummeting income inequality as blue-collar wage gains outpace white-collar ones.

* [More people are satisfied](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df01c4efa0&e=3ee4985eea) with how things are going in the United States than at any point in the past 15 years. Besides the soaring economy, violent crime rates are down, and American strength grows as terror leaders are brought to justice.

* [A record-breaking 90 percent](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a3472f6a89&e=3ee4985eea) of Americans are satisfied with their personal life. “It's likely no coincidence that Americans' heightened satisfaction with their personal life comes as confidence in the U.S. economy and their personal finances are also at long-term or record highs,” Gallup writes.

**To top it off:** While Democrat leaders fume and [rip up speeches](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99eb702547&e=3ee4985eea), the rest of the country is giving President Trump his [highest approval rating](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2296b2d84d&e=3ee4985eea) yet.

**Never before** has the left’s partisanship been so disconnected from reality. When President Trump shared good news in his State of the Union speech—on our economy, our military, or anything else—Democrats refused to cheer. Their one agenda item, impeachment, failed. None of America’s tremendous successes mattered to them.

**But it matters** a lot to working Americans of all backgrounds. We know that because they said so: By a [stunning 40-point margin](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=889aa6f853&e=3ee4985eea), _independents_ said that impeachment was “more important to politicians than it is to me.” About the same number said impeachment was “more important to the media than it is to me.” The issues that _did_ matter to them: healthcare, infrastructure, the economy, and more.

**Democrats have made** their priority clear—and it’s not you. Fortunately, America is succeeding without their help. But it shouldn’t have to be that way.

**🎬** [WATCH: “We went through hell unfairly”—but this is the end result.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5a1c774fda&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: [Today Only] Free book available NOW >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends -

As we've seen, our elections continue to be plagued with disinformation.

FBI Director Christopher Wray said just yesterday, ["foreign disinformation efforts against the U.S. never stopped after Russian actors used them on social media platforms during the 2016 elections."](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaae9/134673f2/37dc8537/69973819/1294437003/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dabook?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

So we want to give you another chance to read Michael's book, _Dividing America - How Russia Hacked Social Media and Democracy_, where he explains Russia's secretive and divisive social media disinformation campaign during the 2016 election -- and the danger it continues to pose for 2020.

[Contribute $10 (or more if you can) to cover shipping and we'll send you a free copy of Michael's book, _DIVIDING AMERICA_. This offer expires today - so don't wait! >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaae9/134673f2/37dc8537/69973819/1294437003/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dabook?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaae9/134673f2/37dc8537/69973819/1294437003/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dabook?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
| | [GET YOUR BOOK >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaae9/134673f2/37dc8537/69973818/1294437003/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dabook?refcode=EM_FR_B3_020620_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

The best way to stop the spread of disinformation is being able to recognize propaganda when you see it. We want as many people as possible to be armed with this knowledge as we head into the presidential election.

However, this opportunity will only be available for a limited time, so chip in $10 (or more if you can) and get your copy now!

Truth is power,

Team Bennet

| | [_**I need your immediate attention: Will you rush $10 to split a donation between my race and Democratic Senator Doug Jones? Doug took a POWERFUL stand last night. We MUST protect him at all costs. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl-dj-em?refcode=20200206_em_fr_b1_savbrl_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") My friend, Democrat Doug Jones, is running in one of the toughest races in the entire Senate. Last night, he took a powerful stand and voted to convict Donald Trump. [**W**e ca** nnot let Senator Jones' brave vote cost him his seat.**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl-dj-em?refcode=20200206_em_fr_b1_savbrl_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") Republicans know how critical Doug's seat is for Democrats' chances of flipping the Senate. Which is why they just launched a barrage of retaliatory attacks against him. Look \-- Doug knew his vote in defense of our democracy could cost him his election. But he did the right thing anyway. We need to rally to his defense like never before. I'm calling on 5,000 gifts before midnight. Will you rush $10 to split a gift between my race and Senator Jones? | | ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl-dj-em?refcode=20200206_em_fr_b1_savbrl_ia&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

Ben Ray

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6e9/18e32a7f/51856b54/7b22480a/1196052380/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6e9/18e32a7f/51856b54/7b22480b/1196052380/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6e9/18e32a7f/51856b54/7b224808/1196052380/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6e9/18e32a7f/51856b54/7b224809/1196052380/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6e9/18e32a7f/51856b54/7b22480e/1196052380/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b6e9/18e32a7f/51856b54/7b22480f/1196052380/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125
